'''鈭歾h-p-p''' ('''zhapapasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanoemboss|nanoemboss]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanoemboss|nanoemboss]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-p-p
|-
! Lemma
| zhapapasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhapapithi|zhapapithi]] || [[word:zhapapiji|zhapapiji]] || [[word:zhapapishi|zhapapishi]] || [[word:zhapapi|zhapapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapaputhuth|zhapaputhuth]] || [[word:zhapapujuj|zhapapujuj]] || [[word:zhapapushush|zhapapushush]] || [[word:zhapap|zhapap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapaputhu|zhapaputhu]] || [[word:zhapapuju|zhapapuju]] || [[word:zhapapushu|zhapapushu]] || [[word:zhapapu|zhapapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapapufuth|zhapapufuth]] || [[word:zhapapufuj|zhapapufuj]] || [[word:zhapapufush|zhapapufush]] || [[word:zhapapuf|zhapapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhapapethe|zhapapethe]] || [[word:zhapapeje|zhapapeje]] || [[word:zhapapeshe|zhapapeshe]] || [[word:zhapape|zhapape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapapothoth|zhapapothoth]] || [[word:zhapapojoj|zhapapojoj]] || [[word:zhapaposhosh|zhapaposhosh]] || [[word:zhapap|zhapap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapapotho|zhapapotho]] || [[word:zhapapojo|zhapapojo]] || [[word:zhapaposho|zhapaposho]] || [[word:zhapapo|zhapapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapapofoth|zhapapofoth]] || [[word:zhapapofoj|zhapapofoj]] || [[word:zhapapofosh|zhapapofosh]] || [[word:zhapapof|zhapapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhapap忙th忙|zhapap忙th忙]] || [[word:zhapap忙j忙|zhapap忙j忙]] || [[word:zhapap忙sh忙|zhapap忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhapap忙|zhapap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapapathath|zhapapathath]] || [[word:zhapapajaj|zhapapajaj]] || [[word:zhapapashash|zhapapashash]] || [[word:zhapap|zhapap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapapatha|zhapapatha]] || [[word:zhapapaja|zhapapaja]] || [[word:zhapapasha|zhapapasha]] || [[word:zhapapa|zhapapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapapafath|zhapapafath]] || [[word:zhapapafaj|zhapapafaj]] || [[word:zhapapafash|zhapapafash]] || [[word:zhapapaf|zhapapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhapapasha|zhapapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhapapasha|gozhapapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhapapasha|gokizhapapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhapapn眉sha|zhapapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhapapnkn眉sha|gozhapapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapapn眉sha|gokizhapapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhapapsh毛sha|zhapapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhapapnksh毛sha|gozhapapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhapapsh毛sha|gokizhapapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapaprosha|zhapaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapapnkrosha|gozhapapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapaprosha|gokizhapaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapapmusha|zhapapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapapnkmusha|gozhapapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapapmusha|gokizhapapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhapapsherasha|zhapapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhapapnksherasha|gozhapapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhapapsherasha|gokizhapapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhapapngasha|zhapapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhapapnkngasha|gozhapapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhapapngasha|gokizhapapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhapapyasha|zhapapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhapapnkyasha|gozhapapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhapapyasha|gokizhapapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhapapyamasha|zhapapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhapapnkyamasha|gozhapapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhapapyamasha|gokizhapapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhapapn眉sh毛sha|zhapapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhapapnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhapapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhapapn眉sh毛sha|gokizhapapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapapn眉rosha|zhapapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapapnkn眉rosha|gozhapapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapapn眉rosha|gokizhapapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapapn眉musha|zhapapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapapnkn眉musha|gozhapapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapapn眉musha|gokizhapapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhapapsh毛n眉sha|zhapapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhapapnksh毛n眉sha|gozhapapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapapsh毛n眉sha|gokizhapapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapapsh毛rosha|zhapapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapapnksh毛rosha|gozhapapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapapsh毛rosha|gokizhapapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapapsh毛musha|zhapapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapapnksh毛musha|gozhapapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapapsh毛musha|gokizhapapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhapapron眉sha|zhapapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhapapnkron眉sha|gozhapapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapapron眉sha|gokizhapapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhapaprosh毛sha|zhapaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhapapnkrosh毛sha|gozhapapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhapaprosh毛sha|gokizhapaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapapromusha|zhapapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapapnkromusha|gozhapapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapapromusha|gokizhapapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhapapmun眉sha|zhapapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhapapnkmun眉sha|gozhapapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapapmun眉sha|gokizhapapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhapapmush毛sha|zhapapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhapapnkmush毛sha|gozhapapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhapapmush毛sha|gokizhapapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapapmurosha|zhapapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapapnkmurosha|gozhapapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapapmurosha|gokizhapapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhapap|zhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙p忙p|zh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhapap|hozhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙p忙p|hozh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhapap|hohozhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙p忙p|hohozh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhapap|n眉zhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙p忙p|n眉zh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhapap|n眉n眉zhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙p忙p|n眉n眉zh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhapap|n茂zhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙p忙p|n茂zh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhapap|n茂n茂zhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙p忙p|n茂n茂zh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhapap|luzhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙p忙p|luzh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhapap|luluzhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙p忙p|luluzh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhapap|lizhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙p忙p|lizh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhapap|lilizhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙p忙p|lilizh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhapap|kozhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙p忙p|kozh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhapap|kokozhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙p忙p|kokozh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhapap|kezhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙p忙p|kezh忙p忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhapap|kekezhapap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙p忙p|kekezh忙p忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
